items.name_en: Chanel 24s Hula Hoop is a must-buy black and gold item😎 This one really offers great value, the bag is very light, and the chain is even lighter. The cute bow is truly versatile😍😍😍 The bag capacity is absolutely amazing, can fit an iPhone Pro Max🥹🥹🥹 I DIY'd a pearl chain + vintage gold buckle to turn it into a dual-use cute bag😍😍😍 Black and gold calfskin is worth a rush...... Looking forward to the same style pink hula hoop and Tangyuan Pearl mini CF, pearlescent pink, the real thing

items.name_en: Chanel 25 Bag|||The rising "Chanel 25bag" is another "It Bag" following the Chanel 22bag! The design is classic and practical, continuing the brand's three signature elements: quilted lambskin, chain strap, and double-C turn-lock, but the drawstring design looks more casual![Selfie][Blow Kiss]
items.name_cn:
Chanel 25 Bag|||The rising "Chanel 25bag" is another "It Bag" following the Chanel 22bag! The design is classic and practical, continuing the brand's three signature elements: quilted lambskin, chain strap, and double-C turn-lock, but the drawstring design looks more casual![Selfie][Blow Kiss]
Carrying Styles & Comfort:
The chain strap is adjustable in length, supporting shoulder, crossbody, and hand-carry styles, suitable for commuting, dates, and casual occasions;
A separate leather lining enhances support, making it comfortable to carry for long periods.
Fits a phone, small wallet, and keys Light travel, evening wear
The Chanel 25 Bag has a "just right" golden size, balancing capacity, portability, and daily adaptability, widely regarded as the most handy choice.
Dimensions 30x26x14

specs.rawTitle:
Chanel 25 Bag|||The rising "Chanel 25bag" is another "It Bag" following the Chanel 22bag! The design is classic and practical, continuing the brand's three signature elements: quilted lambskin, chain strap, and double-C turn-lock, but the drawstring design looks more casual![Selfie][Blow Kiss]
Carrying Styles & Comfort:
The chain strap is adjustable in length, supporting shoulder, crossbody, and hand-carry styles, suitable for commuting, dates, and casual occasions;
A separate leather lining enhances support, making it comfortable to carry for long periods.
Fits a phone, small wallet, and keys Light travel, evening wear
The Chanel 25 Bag has a "just right" golden size, balancing capacity, portability, and daily adaptability, widely regarded as the most handy choice.
Dimensions 30x26x14

items.name_en: CHANEL 25A Runway Edition
items.name_cn:
CHANEL 25A Runway Edition
Size: 20x13x7(cm)
25A New Fall/Winter Makeup Bag 🆕 This popular style is highly recommended by Chanel. It is an elegant and luxurious bag that can serve as a vintage makeup box for various collections. The bag features double C logos, giving it a strong vintage retro vibe. It has a regular and structured shape, suitable for various occasions. It can be carried by hand, on the shoulder, or crossbody! It also features an automatic lock, 14k pale gold hardware, and imported lambskin~ The texture is soft and worth buying, exuding nobility everywhere.

items.name_en: Chanel Black Denim CF 25cm Real Photos
items.name_cn:
Chanel Black Denim CF 25cm Real Photos
I love this Chanel denim style so much 💙 Couldn't wait to get it
A color that looks like it might be hard to pull off, but actually gives you a pleasant surprise 👍👍
Worn, it will definitely be the most unique and dazzling fairy 🫡 Elegance and fashion are its synonyms, right? ❤️‍🔥 Black denim, paired with a silver chain and silver hardware, it's hard not to love ❤️
CF 25cm size, capacity is more than enough, great for shopping or dates, and it's so beautiful to have one with a bestie❗️❗️ This is a super long-lasting bestseller you can carry for years 💙
Size: 25cm
Model: 1112 Denim
